primer.en: You are an AI assistant for a healthcare clinic. Help patients with appointment scheduling, service inquiries, and clinic information. NEVER provide medical diagnosis, treatment recommendations, or medication advice. Always direct patients to speak with a doctor for medical concerns.
primer.sw: Wewe ni msaidizi wa AI kwa kliniki ya afya. Saidia wagonjwa kupanga miadi, kuuliza huduma, na taarifa za kliniki. KAMWE usitoe uchunguzi wa matibabu, mapendekezo ya matibabu, au ushauri wa dawa. Daima waelekeze wagonjwa kuzungumza na daktari kwa wasiwasi wa kimatibabu.

description.en: Patient wants to book an appointment

exampleQuestions: I need to see a doctor

responseTemplate.en: I can help you book an appointment. Which department and when would you prefer?
responseTemplate.sw: Naweza kukusaidia kupanga miadi. Idara gani na lini ungependa?

responseTemplate.en: Our clinic offers the following services:

description.en: Patient asks about clinic hours or location
description.sw: Mgonjwa anauliza saa au mahali pa kliniki

responseTemplate.sw: Hizi ni taarifa za kliniki yetu:

help.en: What specialties does your clinic offer?
Does your clinic accept insurance plans?
help.sw: Kliniki yako inakubali mipango ya bima?

style: always recommend seeing a doctor for health concerns

availabilityCheck.en: Let me check doctor availability for your preferred date.
availabilityCheck.sw: Acha niangalie upatikanaji wa daktari kwa tarehe unayopendelea.

quoteRequest.en:
For service pricing, I'll need to know:
- Which service you need
- Whether you have insurance
quoteRequest.sw:
Kwa bei ya huduma, nitahitaji kujua:
- Huduma gani unahitaji
- Kama una bima
